effect.subject: tint/transparency values
effect.reserved_for: the specified campaign headline letter tint (≈40%), Light Blue callout (70%), Golden Sand callout (30%), and wave top layer (70%) tints, plus full palette values

rule_text: No other ad-hoc tints are permitted — use full palette values or only the specified tints (campaign headline letter ≈40%, Light Blue callout 70%, Golden Sand callout 30%, wave top layer 70%).
intent: Prevent arbitrary opacity values that dilute the brand palette.
summary: Use only full palette values or specified tints: campaign headline letter ~40%, Light Blue callout 70%, Golden Sand callout 30%, wave top layer 70%.
